tools.name: transcribe_media
tools.description: Transcribe an audio or video file using Whisper. Provide a file_path to the media file. Set mode to 'api' (OpenAI cloud) or 'local' (whisper.cpp on-device). Ask the user which mode they prefer before calling.

file_path.description: Absolute path to a local audio or video file to transcribe

mode.description: Transcription backend: 'api' for OpenAI Whisper API (cloud), 'local' for whisper.cpp (on-device)

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called
